name: unraid-modernui
description: Clean, flat, responsive theme for Unraid 7.x. v0.5.3: .plg install no longer fails XML validation — wrapped the CHANGES block in CDATA so changelog text (raw `&`, `<link>`, etc.) is no longer re-parsed as XML. Package contents unchanged from v0.5.2.

scripts.test: npm run test:ts && npm run test:php
